productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Dark blue denim trousers with a stone washed look, made of a blended fabric, has two side pockets with a patch pocket above the right one, two large back pockets with stitch detailing, comfortable low rise waist with loops, and has a zippered and buttoned fly with reinforced stitching at the crotch area Fitting Slim Fit; low rise Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take edgy dressing to the next level in these slim boot jeans from united colors of benetton. Perfect for casual outings with friends, this denim trouser looks great with grunge tees and leather vests with leather boots. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 42" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
